name: playPopularKpopSongClaude
description: Comparison flow using claudeTask — compare latency/quality

timePeriod.description: Time period for the chart (e.g., 'this month', 'this week')

parameters.goal: Find the most popular K-pop song ${timePeriod}. Search for current K-pop charts and identify the #1 song. Return a JSON object with 'trackName' (song title) and 'artist' (artist name) fields.
